title: Create: Custom Discs
description: This mod adds custom music discs so you can upload .ogg files and use them in game.
body:
![the logo of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e06ff8e1c3f8a9007ae619f79e9c5a5e104bf6fa.png)

# 🎵 Custom Discs

Make your own music discs from any **OGG audio file** — and play them in a jukebox with true **3D proximity audio**.

No resource packs. No server restarts. Just drop in a file and press play.

---

## ✨ Features

- Craft **custom music discs** from any `.ogg` audio file on your computer  
- **3D proximity audio** — sound gets quieter the further you walk from the jukebox, just like vanilla discs *(requires Simple Voice Chat)*  
- **Per-disc volume control** — set the volume when making the disc, shown in the item tooltip  
- **Browse button** — native Windows file picker so you don't have to type file paths  

---

## 🛠️ How to Use

1. Craft a **Disc Recorder** *(Create mod recipe)*  
2. Right-click the recorder  
3. Click **Browse...** and pick your `.ogg` file  
4. Enter a **title**, set the **volume**, and click **Cut Disc**  
5. Put the disc in any **jukebox**

---

## 📦 Dependencies

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) *(for the crafting recipe)*  
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) *(for 3D proximity audio)*  

---

## 🐜 Bugs

- When inserting a disc, you may sometimes briefly hear the start of **C418 – 13**  
- Not compatible with the [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) built-in jukebox *(planned support coming soon)*
- Version 1.0.0 – 1.2.0 has no support for servers.
